## Nebius (NBIS) rallies after landing $775M debt deal to fund AI buildout, with Nvidia as backer

A $775M NVDA-backed debt raise at NBIS validates it as a credible AI compute operator and deepens NVDA's ecosystem flywheel — simultaneously a direct NBIS catalyst and a signal that NVDA is actively seeding the AI infrastructure buildout beyond its own hardware sales.

- NBIS secured a $775M debt financing deal specifically earmarked for AI infrastructure expansion.
- Nvidia is named as a backer of the company, lending strategic credibility to the financing.
- The stock rallied on the announcement, confirming the market reads this as a positive catalyst.
- This is a concrete financing event — not speculative — confirming AI infrastructure capex momentum at the emerging-operator tier.
